@@ -91,19 +91,20 @@ Current `main` already implements the requested hardening bundle, though not alw
 
 ## Close Comment
 
-Closing as implemented on `main` after a Codex review of current `main` (cec34821754a).
+Closing as implemented on `main` after Codex review.
 
-Current `main` already implements the requested hardening bundle, though not always with the exact workflow/file split proposed in the issue. The Control UI logo is local, gateway responses now get baseline security headers with stricter Control UI headers on top, and CI already enforces actionlint/zizmor plus CodeQL and dependency auditing.
+Current `main` already implements the requested hardening bundle. The exact workflow/file split differs from the proposal, but the substance is present: local Control UI assets, baseline gateway security headers, stricter Control UI headers, workflow linting, CodeQL, and dependency auditing.
 
 Evidence:
-- **Local Control UI asset:** `agentLogoUrl` now resolves to the bundled `favicon.svg`, and the asset exists in-repo. (`ui/src/ui/views/agents-utils.ts:243`, `cec34821754a`)
-- **Baseline gateway security headers:** `server-http` applies `setDefaultSecurityHeaders` to HTTP requests, and that helper sets `X-Content-Type-Options`, `Referrer-Policy`, and `Permissions-Policy`. (`src/gateway/server-http.ts:900`, `cec34821754a`)
-- **Control UI hardening headers:** Control UI responses additionally set `X-Frame-Options: DENY` and a CSP, with tests asserting those headers. (`src/gateway/control-ui.ts:142`, `cec34821754a`)
-- **CI enforces actionlint and zizmor:** `workflow-sanity.yml` runs actionlint, and `ci.yml` audits changed workflows with zizmor. (`.github/workflows/workflow-sanity.yml:52`, `cec34821754a`)
-- **Dependency/security scanning is present:** A dedicated CodeQL workflow exists, and main CI also runs production dependency auditing. (`.github/workflows/codeql.yml:1`, `cec34821754a`)
-- **Shipped release proof:** The same hardening paths are present in release tag `v2026.4.22`, so this is not just unreleased `main` state. (`00bd2cf7a376`)
-
-Codex evidence: Reviewed against main [cec34821754a](https://github.com/openclaw/openclaw/commit/cec34821754ad935c780805f3116f99449d46ac2). Fix evidence: release [v2026.4.22](https://github.com/openclaw/openclaw/releases/tag/v2026.4.22), commit [00bd2cf7a376](https://github.com/openclaw/openclaw/commit/00bd2cf7a376f1fba26291c6c4766f1f15cbdfa5).
+- Local Control UI asset: [`ui/src/ui/views/agents-utils.ts:243`](https://github.com/openclaw/openclaw/blob/cec34821754ad935c780805f3116f99449d46ac2/ui/src/ui/views/agents-utils.ts#L243) resolves `agentLogoUrl` to the bundled `favicon.svg`. Reviewed at [`cec34821754a`](https://github.com/openclaw/openclaw/commit/cec34821754ad935c780805f3116f99449d46ac2).
+- Baseline gateway headers: [`src/gateway/server-http.ts:900`](https://github.com/openclaw/openclaw/blob/cec34821754ad935c780805f3116f99449d46ac2/src/gateway/server-http.ts#L900) applies `setDefaultSecurityHeaders`, which sets `X-Content-Type-Options`, `Referrer-Policy`, and `Permissions-Policy`. Reviewed at [`cec34821754a`](https://github.com/openclaw/openclaw/commit/cec34821754ad935c780805f3116f99449d46ac2).
+- Control UI hardening: [`src/gateway/control-ui.ts:142`](https://github.com/openclaw/openclaw/blob/cec34821754ad935c780805f3116f99449d46ac2/src/gateway/control-ui.ts#L142) adds `X-Frame-Options: DENY` and CSP coverage for Control UI responses. Reviewed at [`cec34821754a`](https://github.com/openclaw/openclaw/commit/cec34821754ad935c780805f3116f99449d46ac2).
+- Workflow checks: [`.github/workflows/workflow-sanity.yml:52`](https://github.com/openclaw/openclaw/blob/cec34821754ad935c780805f3116f99449d46ac2/.github/workflows/workflow-sanity.yml#L52) runs actionlint, and [`.github/workflows/ci.yml:367`](https://github.com/openclaw/openclaw/blob/cec34821754ad935c780805f3116f99449d46ac2/.github/workflows/ci.yml#L367) audits changed workflows with zizmor.
+- Security scanning: [`.github/workflows/codeql.yml:1`](https://github.com/openclaw/openclaw/blob/cec34821754ad935c780805f3116f99449d46ac2/.github/workflows/codeql.yml#L1) provides CodeQL, and CI also runs production dependency auditing.
+- Release proof: the same hardening paths are present in [`v2026.4.22`](https://github.com/openclaw/openclaw/releases/tag/v2026.4.22) at [`00bd2cf7a376`](https://github.com/openclaw/openclaw/commit/00bd2cf7a376f1fba26291c6c4766f1f15cbdfa5).
+
+So I’m closing this as already implemented rather than keeping a duplicate hardening request open.
+
